topic: My printer spits out a page each night: a photo taken inside my own house.
title: My Printer Prints A Photo From Inside My House Each Night | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My printer spits out a photo of my own house each night.
scenes.image_prompt: an office printer in a dark room feeding out a glossy photo page, faint status light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It sits in my home office, unplugged from any computer.
scenes.image_prompt: a small home office desk with a printer and tangled cables, dim lamp light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every morning, one fresh page in the tray.
scenes.image_prompt: a printer output tray holding a single printed photo, soft morning light, fog, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first photo showed my living room at night.
scenes.image_prompt: a grainy printed photo of a dark living room interior held in a hand, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was a room I had not been in.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty dim living room, furniture in shadow, faint window glow, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each photo moved closer to my bedroom door.
scenes.image_prompt: a printed photo of a hallway pointing toward a closed door, held over a desk, dim light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged the printer fully and emptied the paper tray.
scenes.image_prompt: hands pulling a power cord from a wall behind a printer, dark office, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next morning, a new photo waited anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: an unplugged printer with a single fresh photo in its tray, cold morning light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The newest photo showed my bedroom, my bed, me sleeping.
scenes.image_prompt: a printed photo of a dark bedroom with a sleeping figure shape, held in a trembling hand, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Whoever took it was standing right beside my pillow.
scenes.image_prompt: a low angle printed photo of a bed from very close, dark room, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped sleeping in that room. I locked the office.
scenes.image_prompt: a closed office door with a key turning in the lock, dim hallway, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the photo showed me, awake, locking that very door.
scenes.image_prompt: a printed photo of a figure from behind locking a door, slid under the same door, fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
